title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Fusion startup Helion hits blistering temps as it races toward 2028 deadline
items.description: Helion's Polaris device hit 150 million degrees C recently, a milestone that nudges the company toward its commercial power plant that will sell elect...

items.title: Waymo is asking DoorDash drivers to shut the doors of its self-driving cars
items.description: If a passenger accidentally leaves a Waymo door open, the vehicle can get stuck in place.

items.title: For $1M, you can pay Bryan Johnson (or BryanAI?) to teach you how to live longer
items.description: The longevity-obsessed investor Bryan Johnson is charging $1 million to sign up for his "Immortals" program.

items.title: Amid disappointing earnings, Pinterest claims it sees more searches than ChatGPT
items.description: Pinterest's stock tumbles after an earnings miss, with higher-than-expected usage its only bright spot.

items.title: IBM will hire your entry-level talent in the age of AI
items.description: IBM plans to triple its entry-level hiring in the U.S. in 2026, but these jobs will have different tasks than in previous years.

items.title: YouTube finally launches a dedicated app for Apple Vision Pro
items.description: When Apple Vision Pro first came out two years ago, YouTube hesitated to release a dedicated app. Today is the day they officially launch one.

items.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: ICE’s Secret Expansion Plans, Palantir Workers’ Ethical Concerns, and AI Assistants
items.description: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, our hosts dive into WIRED’s scoop about a secret Trump administration campaign extending right into your backyard.

items.title: Anthropic raises another $30B in Series G, with a new value of $380B
items.description: The infusion of funding for the AI startup takes place as it is vying for customers and cultural attention with its competitor, OpenAI.

items.title: Didero lands $30M to put manufacturing procurement on ‘agentic’ autopilot
items.description: Didero functions as an agentic AI layer that sits on top of a company’s existing ERP, acting as a coordinator that reads incoming communications and a...

items.title: Musk needed a new vision for SpaceX and xAI. He landed on Moonbase Alpha.
items.description: "I really want to see a mass driver on the moon that is shooting AI satellites into deep space."
